race.comment: MUST BE SAIN (2) ran a nice race first-up at Cranbourne in better company over today's distance. Wasn't suited dropping back to 1000m last start in a run worth overlooking. In the right race today and should be cherry ripe at the third run back from a spell. SKELLIG ROCK (10) has been racing well without winning. Last appeared just seven days ago when an eye-catching third over 1100m at Wangaratta. Drawn to enjoy a cosy run just behind the pace and is sure to prove tough to hold out. ANIA (7) began awkwardly then found the line well when resuming over this distance at Cranbourne recently. This looks a touch easier and her second-up form reads well. Serious contender. MAGNEA (11) has been in fine form this prep following a stable change. Picked up nicely but was narrowly denied at her latest run over 1100m at Wodonga. This looks a lovely race for her. BRAZEN FLING (8) can improve with a step up in distance this afternoon.
